details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present, and reports/audit/ exists, but reports/board/ is missing.

governance_contracts_present: memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs, reports/audit/ exists — but reports/board/ is missing, failing the governance contracts check.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists with active code files (sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py, __init__.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py and scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference Moltbot/Clawdbot in active code. These are not excluded audit/doc references.
